summary: Extended the approval engine to journal entries, payments, purchase invoices, and memos per spec 2026-07-04-document-approvals: amount-tiered rules, per-document 'Pending Approval' status, system-wide no-self-approval (enforceNoSelfApproval, closes the PO hole), JE gate inside postJournalEntry (covers the MCP path), edge-function guards (post-payment/post-memo accept approved Pending Approval under FOR UPDATE; post-purchase-invoice gains its first status guard), post-route parking for payment/memo/invoice, duplicate-floor guard + partial unique index, approval-escalation daily cron, access + SoD reports (CSV), rule cards + escalationDays field + self-approval toggle, notify/link for the four types. One idempotent migration (COMMIT-separated enum adds, journal approver columns, companySettings/approvalRequest columns, approvalRequests view extension). Local gates all pass: scoped typecheck (erp/ee/jobs/database/utils), lint (30/30), tests (19/19 incl. conformance floor). NEEDS VERIFICATION: no local Supabase DB was available, so generated DB types were hand-patched to mirror generate:types (maintainer should apply the migration and re-run pnpm run generate:types to confirm parity) and the DB/browser acceptance flows (real JE posting, direct edge-function invocation, escalation firing, amount tiering, CSV export) were not exercised. Deferred: reversal/void approver notifications (existing events would render misleading copy).
